name: Trout Baked in Wine
recipeInstructions: Scale and gut the trout if not cleaned already. You can filet it, or do not; it hardly matters. Cut the trout in half lengthwise and lay in a baking dish. Cover barely with white wine. Add herbs (such as parsley, thyme, herbes de Provence, or garlic), if desired. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
